title: croton engelmannii
intro: Croton engelmannii, also known as the Engelmann's croton, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Croton engelmannii include its potential to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and kill bacteria. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically obtained by boiling the leaves or roots in water.
